form.formComment: Last start by a 0.8 m (Fr7) at this track (3:05.00) beating Jordan Anne in on April 12 at $6.30. Great chance to make it two in a row.

form.formComment: Backs up 4 days after failing to impress last start; 6th (Fr1) over 2400m at this track, beaten 40 m by He Aint Fakin (3:02.40) on April 12 at $7. Showed ability the outing before when he posted a big 4 m win (Fr4) at Ascot Park Raceway (2:51.20) beating Call Dudley in on April 2 at $3.30. Sure to be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 6th (Fr3) over 2400m at Mt Harding, beaten 17 m by Huckleberry (3:08.60) in 4yo+ on April 12 at $8.80. Before that 11th (10m 4) over 2600m at Addington beaten 45 m by Prestigious (3:17.50) in 4yo+ on April 4. Has the task ahead.
